name: Solid Tufted Micropoly Shag Area Rug - Threshold™
description:
If you're looking for a new accent rug for any space in your home, look no further than this Solid Tufted Micropoly Shag Area Rug from Threshold™. Featuring a thick, plush pile that is wonderfully soft underfoot, you'll love sinking your feet into the silky, tufted fibers after a long day of work or play. The solid colors blend easily with existing decor styles, and the rug can be spot-cleaned or wiped clean for easy maintenance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
